_about: Reference targets for ddX-enabled PCM validation. PRODUCTION PCM PHYSICS IS FORTRAN-SIDE; these values are comparison targets only and never feed the SCF. The paper-facing closed-shell HF tier uses Born/ddX plus f(eps)*PySCF ddCOSMO because PySCF solvent.ddpcm fails the Born-ion oracle; PySCF ddPCM values are diagnostic/problematic comparators, not final hard gates. A row is a hard pass/fail gate when reference_value is non-null and status is 'verified'.

trusted_reference_regressions.description: ddPCM electrostatic solvation energy of a fixed 12-site point-charge model (no QM SCF). Validates the OpenQP<->ddX adapter numerics (model build -> solve -> esolv) only.
trusted_reference_regressions.source: source/solvent_ddx_adapter.c::oqp_ddx_run_point_charge_smoke (dense ddPCM, se=-1; value asserted in-source within 1e-6 at line ~191); printed as energy=<float> by tests/ddx_adapter_smoke.c

empirical_verification.note: Verified via real ddX build through oqp_ddx_adapter_smoke after the intentional dense/no-FMM and se=-1 protocol alignment. Full ddx_ddrun lifecycle and explicit setup/solve lifecycle agree to ~4.8e-14. FD check: |dE/dphi0-(-0.5 q_cav0)|~6.6e-09 vs |dE/dphi0-q_cav0|~9.1e-05, confirming chg=-0.5*q_cav.

trusted_reference_regressions.validates: ddX model allocation, electrostatics, forward/adjoint solve, and esolv numerics through the OpenQP-owned C adapter
trusted_reference_regressions.does_not_validate: QM SCF coupling -- electronic contribution to psi, q_cav sign/scale into the Fock operator, phi_cav-from-density convention, and e_pcm vs 0.5*Tr[D.V] bookkeeping all remain open and require the Tier-2 QM benchmarks below

benchmarks.reference_source: PySCF ddCOSMO reaction-field energy scaled by f(eps)=(eps-1)/eps under the matched protocol (eps=78.3553, lmax=8, Lebedev 302, eta=0.1, Bondi-by-Z radii; spherical 6-31G*), used as the paper-facing reference because Born/ddX validation passes while PySCF solvent.ddpcm fails the Born-ion oracle. See /bighome/alireza/Projects/MRSF-PCM/pcm_rhf_rohf_openqp_pyscf_ddcosmo_reference_20260610_170539/results/report_scaled_ddcosmo.md and /bighome/alireza/Projects/MRSF-PCM/pcm_rhf_rohf_openqp_pyscf_ddcosmo_reference_20260610_170539/results/openqp_vs_pyscf_scaled_ddcosmo_and_ddpcm_comparison.csv.
benchmarks.doi_or_url: n/a; Born/ddX + f(eps)*PySCF ddCOSMO validation package, not a literature value
benchmarks.benchmark_label: H2O RHF/HF/6-31G* OpenQP ddX/ddPCM vs f(eps)*PySCF ddCOSMO water
benchmarks.independent_validation: OpenQP - f(eps)*PySCF ddCOSMO = +0.094 kcal/mol; OpenQP - PySCF solvent.ddpcm diagnostic = -0.650 kcal/mol. PySCF solvent.ddpcm is retained only as a diagnostic/problematic comparator because it fails the Born-ion oracle.
benchmarks.openqp_e_pcm_provenance: native OpenQP ddX/ddPCM full-density source projection with corrected exterior leak recurrence, f(eps) energy convention, and full variational Fock coupling; OpenQP values reused from /bighome/alireza/Projects/MRSF-PCM/pcm_rhf_rohf_openqp_pyscf_leakfix_final_20260610_164404.

benchmarks.reference_source: OpenQP/ddX closed-shell diagnostic baseline retained for regression only. This DFT row is not an independent Born/ddX + f(eps)*PySCF ddCOSMO validation gate.
benchmarks.doi_or_url: n/a; OpenQP/ddX same-branch diagnostic baseline, not a literature value
benchmarks.benchmark_label: H2O RHF/BHHLYP/6-31G* ddPCM water diagnostic baseline
benchmarks.scope_review: Deferred from 'verified': closed-shell DFT (BHHLYP/PBE) PCM is beyond the handoff's RHF-energy-first scope. Physically sound (negative e_pcm, passes self-consistency gate) and retained as a regression baseline, but not a verified gate until DFT-PCM scope is opened and an independent reference exists.

Not a valid regression baseline until the source term is improved (higher l / density-projected psi).

_review.regression_baseline_caveat: Tier-2 closed-shell HF reference_value entries are now f(eps)*PySCF ddCOSMO targets, not PySCF solvent.ddpcm targets. PySCF solvent.ddpcm is kept only as a diagnostic/problematic comparator because it fails the Born-ion oracle under this protocol. DFT rows remain deferred/diagnostic OpenQP baselines.
_review.scope_note: The 10-molecule x {HF,BHHLYP,PBE} matrix exceeds the handoff's H2O-first / RHF-energy scope. Retained as regression baselines, but DFT and the larger polar set are beyond the originally instructed scope.

_independent_validation.method: OpenQP native ddX/ddPCM e_PCM compared to Born/ddX-validated f(eps)*PySCF ddCOSMO. PySCF solvent.ddpcm is reported only as a diagnostic/problematic comparator because it fails the Born-ion oracle.
_independent_validation.verdict: OpenQP remains native ddX/ddPCM, not ddCOSMO. It passes the Born/ddX validation story and agrees with f(eps)*PySCF ddCOSMO to <=0.166 kcal/mol over the 20-row RHF/ROHF sanity set. Large residuals versus PySCF solvent.ddpcm are reference-diagnostic evidence, not a final OpenQP failure.
